TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: U lusid nu Pangcah U lusid nu Pangcah, i kabana'an nu nimanima i, sabacal teli'sananay, sulinay dadahal ku niyaru' nu Pangcah, namaka Tatiboracan tangasa i pusung, midungdung aca tu liyal, caay kanca kamelaw tu kira narakatan nu Pangcah, sisa pakayra i saamisan a malingatu ku silsil, tangasa i siwkulan atu waliay nu dungdung tu liyal a Pangcah, tangasa i satimulan nu Balangaw atu Palidaw, caay kasasulecad ku lusid nu niyaniyaru'. Pakayra i cengel kita a mimelaw, i amisay u lahengangay, muhetingay, bucalah ku tapang, i tilaay i makatimul i, misengi tu buduy nu Piyuma, simisamis, sicacahebayan i abala, u muhetingay, u kaimuay, u atipulingay, langdaway, lahengangay atu kulawlaway a cengel. Anu semuwal tu buduy i, a maka tusaay a patekenan nu mihecaan kiyari a malingatu a pasuwal, u Pangcah nitiyahen, u tubah nu kilang ku sapsakidudung a misanga tu tuper, tu tawpaw, sabuut, hundusi, talip atu satamec, ira ku nisuri naitiyahen. Mahaen ku nipisatapang tu babahi a misaselal, u buduy nu kapah atu timpi kiyari ku mamelawen atu sakabana tu nikasaselal. Tadaadihay tu ku buduy nu kapah, pakayra i tuper, tawpaw, sicaledungay, hahidaw, buduy payayaw, sakikamay, hundusi, talip, satelec, sateleng, satelep, sacahebay atu nisangaan tu nu balaku nu kararayan a kucu. U limucedan a kayingi, sinanut tu sapatungal tu buduy ku tapang. Ira emin nu caluk a lusid i, pakayra i tawpaw, payayaw, mapusutay a buduy, sukun, satelec atu talakes a masuramud. U tapang nu satungal, ira ku timpi nu babainay, nu babahi i cu'ung, ulet, sabetbet, cangaw, cael, pay'ayaw, sakipatelaw, satamec karing. U caay kaw mamasiday ku tuper, u mamelawan atu sapasubana'i niyaru', adihay ku nisanga tu sapamisamis tu tuper, tu sapamelaw tu tarakaw nu tiren i selal, tu sakacaay yaaca kaw mamatudung nu nimanima a macaluk, sisa u sakahemekan ku lingatu nu tuper. U rumasatu u cakaw, ira ku nipasuwal nu matu'asay, anu tatak ku buhang nu cakaw u sakapahay a sining kira, sisa adihay ku sasangaan tu cakaw, matiya u nu lalacan, nu ukak, nu bekeluh, nu awul, nu kilang, nu manaw, nu kangkang, nu banuh adihay caay kaw mamaasip.
S.PHON: o~u~u ɾo~u~usiɬ~ɮ no~u~u paŋʦaħ o~u~u ɾo~u~usiɬ~ɮ no~u~u paŋʦaħ, i kab~b~vanaʡan no~u~u nimanima i, sab~b~vaʦaɾ təɾiʡsananaj, so~u~uɾinaj ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ ko~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ no~u~u paŋʦaħ, namaka tatib~b~vo~uraʦan taŋasa i po~u~uso~u~uŋ, miɬ~ɮo~u~uŋɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ aʦa to~u~u ɾijaɾ, ʦaaj kanʦa kaməɾaw to~u~u kira narakatan no~u~u paŋʦaħ, sisa pakajra i saamisan a maɾiŋato~u~u ko~u~u siɾsiɾ, taŋasa i siwko~u~uɾan ato~u~u waɾiaj no~u~u ɬ~ɮo~u~uŋɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u~u ɾijaɾ a paŋʦaħ, taŋasa i satimo~u~uɾan no~u~u b~b~vaɾaŋaw ato~u~u paɾiɬ~ɮaw, ʦaaj kasaso~u~uɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u ɾo~u~usiɬ~ɮ no~u~u nijanijaro~u~uʡ. pakajra i ʦəŋəɾ kita a miməɾaw, i amisaj o~u~u ɾaħəŋaŋaj, mo~u~uħətiŋaj, b~b~vo~u~uʦaɾaħ ko~u~u tapaŋ, i tiɾaaj i makatimo~u~uɾ i, misəŋi to~u~u b~b~vo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uj no~u~u pijo~u~uma, simisamis, siʦaʦaħəb~b~vajan i ab~b~vaɾa, o~u~u mo~u~uħətiŋaj, o~u~u kaimo~u~uaj, o~u~u atipo~u~uɾiŋaj, ɾaŋɬ~ɮawaj, ɾaħəŋaŋaj ato~u~u ko~u~uɾawɾawaj a ʦəŋəɾ. ano~u~u səmo~u~uwaɾ to~u~u b~b~vo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uj i, a maka to~u~usaaj a patəkənan no~u~u miħəʦaan kijari a maɾiŋato~u~u a paso~u~uwaɾ, o~u~u paŋʦaħ nitijaħən, o~u~u to~u~ub~b~vaħ no~u~u kiɾaŋ ko~u~u sapsakiɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ a misaŋa to~u~u to~u~upər, to~u~u tawpaw, sab~b~vo~u~uo~u~ut, ħo~u~unɬ~ɮo~u~usi, taɾip ato~u~u sataməʦ, ira ko~u~u niso~u~uri naitijaħən. maħaən ko~u~u nipisatapaŋ to~u~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi a misasəɾaɾ, o~u~u b~b~vo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uj no~u~u kapaħ ato~u~u timpi kijari ko~u~u maməɾawən ato~u~u sakab~b~vana to~u~u nikasasəɾaɾ. taɬ~ɮaaɬ~ɮiħaj to~u~u ko~u~u b~b~vo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uj no~u~u kapaħ, pakajra i to~u~upər, tawpaw, siʦaɾəɬ~ɮo~u~uŋaj, ħaħiɬ~ɮaw, b~b~vo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uj pajajaw, sakikamaj, ħo~u~unɬ~ɮo~u~usi, taɾip, satəɾəʦ, satəɾəŋ, satəɾəp, saʦaħəb~b~vaj ato~u~u nisaŋaan to~u~u no~u~u b~b~vaɾako~u~u no~u~u kararajan a ko~u~uʦo~u~u. o~u~u ɾimo~u~uʦəɬ~ɮan a kajiŋi, sinano~u~ut to~u~u sapato~u~uŋaɾ to~u~u b~b~vo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uj ko~u~u tapaŋ. ira əmin no~u~u ʦaɾo~u~uk a ɾo~u~usiɬ~ɮ i, pakajra i tawpaw, pajajaw, mapo~u~uso~u~utaj a b~b~vo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uj, so~u~uko~u~un, satəɾəʦ ato~u~u taɾakəs a maso~u~uramo~u~uɬ~ɮ. o~u~u tapaŋ no~u~u sato~u~uŋaɾ, ira ko~u~u timpi no~u~u b~b~vab~b~vainaj, no~u~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi i ʦo~u~uʡo~u~uŋ, o~u~uɾət, sab~b~vətb~b~vət, ʦaŋaw, ʦaəɾ, pajʡajaw, sakipatəɾaw, sataməʦ kariŋ. o~u~u ʦaaj kaw mamasiɬ~ɮaj ko~u~u to~u~upər, o~u~u maməɾawan ato~u~u sapaso~u~ub~b~vanaʡi nijaro~u~uʡ, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u nisaŋa to~u~u sapamisamis to~u~u to~u~upər, to~u~u sapaməɾaw to~u~u tarakaw no~u~u tirən i səɾaɾ, to~u~u sakaʦaaj jaaʦa kaw mamato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ no~u~u nimanima a maʦaɾo~u~uk, sisa o~u~u sakaħəməkan ko~u~u ɾiŋato~u~u no~u~u to~u~upər. o~u~u ro~u~umasato~u~u o~u~u ʦakaw, ira ko~u~u nipaso~u~uwaɾ no~u~u mato~u~uʡasaj, ano~u~u tatak ko~u~u b~b~vo~u~uħaŋ no~u~u ʦakaw o~u~u sakapaħaj a siniŋ kira, sisa aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u sasaŋaan to~u~u ʦakaw, matija o~u~u no~u~u ɾaɾaʦan, no~u~u o~u~ukak, no~u~u b~b~vəkəɾo~u~uħ, no~u~u awo~u~uɾ, no~u~u kiɾaŋ, no~u~u manaw, no~u~u kaŋkaŋ, no~u~u b~b~vano~u~uħ aɬ~ɮiħaj ʦaaj kaw mamaasip.
S.FORM: U lusid nu Pangcah U lusid nu Pangcah, i kabana'an nu nimanima i, sabacal teli'sananay, sulinay dadahal ku niyaru' nu Pangcah, namaka Tatiboracan tangasa i pusung, midungdung aca tu liyal, caay kanca kamelaw tu kira narakatan nu Pangcah, sisa pakayra i saamisan a malingatu ku silsil, tangasa i siwkulan atu waliay nu dungdung tu liyal a Pangcah, tangasa i satimulan nu Balangaw atu Palidaw, caay kasasulecad ku lusid nu niyaniyaru'. Pakayra i cengel kita a mimelaw, i amisay u lahengangay, muhetingay, bucalah ku tapang, i tilaay i makatimul i, misengi tu buduy nu Piyuma, simisamis, sicacahebayan i abala, u muhetingay, u kaimuay, u atipulingay, langdaway, lahengangay atu kulawlaway a cengel. Anu semuwal tu buduy i, a maka tusaay a patekenan nu mihecaan kiyari a malingatu a pasuwal, u Pangcah nitiyahen, u tubah nu kilang ku sapsakidudung a misanga tu tuper, tu tawpaw, sabuut, hundusi, talip atu satamec, ira ku nisuri naitiyahen. Mahaen ku nipisatapang tu babahi a misaselal, u buduy nu kapah atu timpi kiyari ku mamelawen atu sakabana tu nikasaselal. Tadaadihay tu ku buduy nu kapah, pakayra i tuper, tawpaw, sicaledungay, hahidaw, buduy payayaw, sakikamay, hundusi, talip, satelec, sateleng, satelep, sacahebay atu nisangaan tu nu balaku nu kararayan a kucu. U limucedan a kayingi, sinanut tu sapatungal tu buduy ku tapang. Ira emin nu caluk a lusid i, pakayra i tawpaw, payayaw, mapusutay a buduy, sukun, satelec atu talakes a masuramud. U tapang nu satungal, ira ku timpi nu babainay, nu babahi i cu'ung, ulet, sabetbet, cangaw, cael, pay'ayaw, sakipatelaw, satamec karing. U caay kaw mamasiday ku tuper, u mamelawan atu sapasubana'i niyaru', adihay ku nisanga tu sapamisamis tu tuper, tu sapamelaw tu tarakaw nu tiren i selal, tu sakacaay yaaca kaw mamatudung nu nimanima a macaluk, sisa u sakahemekan ku lingatu nu tuper. U rumasatu u cakaw, ira ku nipasuwal nu matu'asay, anu tatak ku buhang nu cakaw u sakapahay a sining kira, sisa adihay ku sasangaan tu cakaw, matiya u nu lalacan, nu ukak, nu bekeluh, nu awul, nu kilang, nu manaw, nu kangkang, nu banuh adihay caay kaw mamaasip.

tatib~b~vo~uraʦan taŋasa i po~u~uso~u~uŋ, miɬ~ɮo~u~uŋɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ aʦa to~u~u ɾijaɾ, ʦaaj kanʦa kaməɾaw to~u~u kira narakatan no~u~u paŋʦaħ, sisa pakajra i saamisan a maɾiŋato~u~u ko~u~u siɾsiɾ, taŋasa i siwko~u~uɾan ato~u~u waɾiaj no~u~u ɬ~ɮo~u~uŋɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u~u ɾijaɾ a paŋʦaħ, taŋasa i satimo~u~uɾan no~u~u b~b~vaɾaŋaw ato~u~u paɾiɬ~ɮaw, ʦaaj kasaso~u~uɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u ɾo~u~usiɬ~ɮ no~u~u nijanijaro~u~uʡ. pakajra i ʦəŋəɾ kita a miməɾaw, i amisaj o~u~u ɾaħəŋaŋaj, mo~u~uħətiŋaj, b~b~vo~u~uʦaɾaħ ko~u~u tapaŋ, i tiɾaaj i makatimo~u~uɾ i, misəŋi to~u~u b~b~vo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uj no~u~u pijo~u~uma, simisamis, siʦaʦaħəb~b~vajan i ab~b~vaɾa, o~u~u mo~u~uħətiŋaj, o~u~u kaimo~u~uaj, o~u~u atipo~u~uɾiŋaj, ɾaŋɬ~ɮawaj, ɾaħəŋaŋaj ato~u~u ko~u~uɾawɾawaj a ʦəŋəɾ. ano~u~u səmo~u~uwaɾ to~u~u b~b~vo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uj i, a maka to~u~usaaj a patəkənan no~u~u miħəʦaan kijari a maɾiŋato~u~u a paso~u~uwaɾ, o~u~u paŋʦaħ nitijaħən, o~u~u to~u~ub~b~vaħ no~u~u kiɾaŋ ko~u~u sapsakiɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ a misaŋa to~u~u to~u~upər, to~u~u tawpaw, sab~b~vo~u~uo~u~ut, ħo~u~unɬ~ɮo~u~usi, taɾip ato~u~u sataməʦ, ira ko~u~u niso~u~uri naitijaħən. maħaən ko~u~u nipisatapaŋ to~u~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi a misasəɾaɾ, o~u~u b~b~vo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uj no~u~u kapaħ ato~u~u timpi kijari ko~u~u maməɾawən ato~u~u sakab~b~vana to~u~u nikasasəɾaɾ. taɬ~ɮaaɬ~ɮiħaj to~u~u ko~u~u b~b~vo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uj no~u~u kapaħ, pakajra i to~u~upər, tawpaw, siʦaɾəɬ~ɮo~u~uŋaj, ħaħiɬ~ɮaw, b~b~vo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uj pajajaw, sakikamaj, ħo~u~unɬ~ɮo~u~usi, taɾip, satəɾəʦ, satəɾəŋ, satəɾəp, saʦaħəb~b~vaj ato~u~u nisaŋaan to~u~u no~u~u b~b~vaɾako~u~u no~u~u kararajan a ko~u~uʦo~u~u. o~u~u ɾimo~u~uʦəɬ~ɮan a kajiŋi, sinano~u~ut to~u~u sapato~u~uŋaɾ to~u~u b~b~vo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uj ko~u~u tapaŋ. ira əmin no~u~u ʦaɾo~u~uk a ɾo~u~usiɬ~ɮ i, pakajra i tawpaw, pajajaw, mapo~u~uso~u~utaj a b~b~vo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uj, so~u~uko~u~un, satəɾəʦ ato~u~u taɾakəs a maso~u~uramo~u~uɬ~ɮ. o~u~u tapaŋ no~u~u sato~u~uŋaɾ, ira ko~u~u timpi no~u~u b~b~vab~b~vainaj, no~u~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi i ʦo~u~uʡo~u~uŋ, o~u~uɾət, sab~b~vətb~b~vət, ʦaŋaw, ʦaəɾ, pajʡajaw, sakipatəɾaw, sataməʦ kariŋ. o~u~u ʦaaj kaw mamasiɬ~ɮaj ko~u~u to~u~upər, o~u~u maməɾawan ato~u~u sapaso~u~ub~b~vanaʡi nijaro~u~uʡ, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u nisaŋa to~u~u sapamisamis to~u~u to~u~upər, to~u~u sapaməɾaw to~u~u tarakaw no~u~u tirən i səɾaɾ, to~u~u sakaʦaaj jaaʦa kaw mamato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ no~u~u nimanima a maʦaɾo~u~uk, sisa o~u~u sakaħəməkan ko~u~u ɾiŋato~u~u no~u~u to~u~upər. o~u~u ro~u~umasato~u~u o~u~u ʦakaw, ira ko~u~u nipaso~u~uwaɾ no~u~u mato~u~uʡasaj, ano~u~u tatak ko~u~u b~b~vo~u~uħaŋ no~u~u ʦakaw o~u~u sakapaħaj a siniŋ kira, sisa aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u sasaŋaan to~u~u ʦakaw, matija o~u~u no~u~u ɾaɾaʦan, no~u~u o~u~ukak, no~u~u b~b~vəkəɾo~u~uħ, no~u~u awo~u~uɾ, no~u~u kiɾaŋ, no~u~u manaw, no~u~u kaŋkaŋ, no~u~u b~b~vano~u~uħ aɬ~ɮiħaj ʦaaj kaw mamaasip.
